attacking_style: Not an attacker - operates as a leadout specialist and domestique, working in final kilometers to position sprinters rather than pursuing personal results.
team_tactics: Deployed in high-tempo chase work and sprint trains, sacrificing personal energy to set up teammates like Sagan. Used as expendable workhorse in doomed efforts.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where leadout skills are valued. Exposed on technical finales with street furniture and urban hazards that require bike handling precision.
vulnerability: Crashes in technical zones with street furniture; poor timing judgment on when chase efforts are viable; exhausts himself in futile team efforts.
key_patterns: Functions as leadout specialist for sprinters, particularly Sagan (2 observations)
Vulnerable to crashes in technical urban finales with street furniture (2 observations)
Poor tactical judgment, committing to doomed chase efforts prematurely (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Both observations show race-ending incidents - crash removing him from finale, and mistimed exhausting chase work
